parameters.query:
INSERT INTO users (display_name, picture_url, channel, external_user_id, role)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.displayName }}',
  '{{ $json.pictureUrl }}',
  'line',
  '{{ $json.lineUserId }}',
  'customer'
)
ON CONFLICT (channel, external_user_id) DO UPDATE SET
  display_name = EXCLUDED.display_name,
  picture_url = EXCLUDED.picture_url,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id;

WITH existing AS (
  SELECT id FROM conversations
  WHERE customer_user_id = '{{ $json.id }}'::uuid
    AND status IN ('open', 'pending')
  ORDER BY last_message_at DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 1
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO conversations (customer_user_id, channel, status)
  SELECT '{{ $json.id }}'::uuid, 'line', 'open'
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing)
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT id FROM existing UNION ALL SELECT id FROM inserted LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO messages (
  conversation_id,
  sender_user_id,
  sender_type,
  direction,
  message_type,
  content_text,
  provider_message_id
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $("PG: Upsert User").first().json.id }}'::uuid,
  'customer',
  'inbound',
  '{{ $("Prepare Data").first().json.messageType }}',
  '{{ $("Prepare Data").first().json.messageText }}',
  '{{ $("Prepare Data").first().json.messageId }}'
)
RETURNING id, created_at;
